summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of UX overhaul from CRM to AI Product Builder. Successfully verified hero blocks, simplified navigation, empty states, design colors, and demo authentication for both client and developer roles.

critical_bugs.issue: Project creation via Start Project button appears to fail silently
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents users from creating new projects through the main hero CTA
critical_bugs.symptoms: Button click doesn't result in project creation, input field doesn't clear, no error messages shown

integration_issues.issue: Start Project button doesn't successfully create projects

passed_tests: Client Dashboard hero block with 'What do you want to build?' input loads correctly
Client Dashboard Start Project button is properly enabled when text is entered
Client Dashboard simplified sidebar shows only Home and Projects navigation
Client Dashboard empty state displays selling copy 'Start your first product in 2 minutes'
Client Dashboard design colors (#0B0F14 background, #151922 cards) implemented correctly
Developer Dashboard Next Task hero block displays 'All caught up!' when no tasks
Developer Dashboard stats cards show Active, In Review, Revision, Completed
Developer Dashboard simplified sidebar shows Home, Work Board, Assignments, Performance
Developer Dashboard navigation between all pages works correctly
Developer Dashboard design colors match specification
Demo authentication works for both client and developer roles
Blue-violet gradients are properly implemented in hero sections
All interactive elements have proper hover states and transitions
Responsive design works correctly on desktop viewport
Typography and spacing follow design system consistently
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix project creation API integration - the /api/requests endpoint appears to not be working correctly when called from the Start Project button. The button click should create a project and clear the input field, but currently fails silently.
